name: Macadamia/Raspberry/White Chocolate Cookie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz White chocolate chips or white solid chocolate, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla; beat well.
3. Stir in the raspberry jam (if using).
4. Mix flour and baking soda in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Fold in the chopped macadamia nuts and white chocolate chips.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly golden.
9. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks.
Note: These cookies freeze well. Freeze in a single layer before transferring to zip-lock bags.
